items.title: Observability for developers building connectors
items.content: Observability for developers building connectors
items.contentSnippet: Observability for developers building connectors

summaries.zh: 该文聚焦于为开发连接器的开发者提供可观测性支持。其核心在于强调可观测性在连接器开发过程中的重要性，旨在帮助开发者更好地监控、调试和优化所构建的连接器。
summaries.en: This article emphasizes the importance of observability for developers who create connectors. Observability provides the necessary insights to monitor, understand, and troubleshoot the performance and behavior of connectors in real-time. For developers, it is a critical practice to ensure their integrations are reliable, efficient, and resilient, enabling them to quickly identify and resolve issues.

items.title: Zero Trust for AI agents
items.content: Zero Trust for AI agents
items.contentSnippet: Zero Trust for AI agents

summaries.zh: 该文章探讨了针对AI智能体的“零信任”安全框架。核心思想是不预先信任任何AI代理或系统，必须持续验证其身份、权限和行为。在人工智能应用中，此原则旨在防止因代理被入侵或误操作导致的数据泄露与系统风险，确保AI交互过程的安全与可控。
summaries.en: The article "Zero Trust for AI agents" discusses applying the Zero Trust security model to artificial intelligence agents. This approach assumes no inherent trust in any agent, regardless of its origin or past behavior. Every request and action made by an AI agent must be continuously verified and authorized. The core principle is to enforce strict access controls and least-privilege permissions to minimize security risks and prevent potential misuse or compromise of the agent's capabilities.

items.summary: 该文章探讨了针对AI智能体的“零信任”安全框架。核心思想是不预先信任任何AI代理或系统，必须持续验证其身份、权限和行为。在人工智能应用中，此原则旨在防止因代理被入侵或误操作导致的数据泄露与系统风险，确保AI交互过程的安全与可控。

items.content: How CodeRabbit used Claude to build an agent orchestration system
items.contentSnippet: How CodeRabbit used Claude to build an agent orchestration system

summaries.en: CodeRabbit utilized the Claude model to develop an agent orchestration system designed to manage and coordinate the workflows of multiple AI agents. This system enables streamlined collaboration between agents, enhancing overall efficiency and capability for complex tasks. The integration focuses on leveraging Claude's strengths to optimize agent interaction and task execution.

items.title: New in Claude Managed Agents: self-hosted sandboxes and MCP tunnels
items.content: New in Claude Managed Agents: self-hosted sandboxes and MCP tunnels
items.contentSnippet: New in Claude Managed Agents: self-hosted sandboxes and MCP tunnels

summaries.zh: Claude Managed Agents 新增两项功能：自托管沙箱和MCP隧道。这两项功能现已可用。
summaries.en: Anthropic has introduced new capabilities for Claude Managed Agents, specifically self-hosted sandboxes and MCP tunnels. The self-hosted sandboxes allow organizations to run Claude's agentic workloads within their own secure, isolated environments. Complementing this, the MCP tunnels provide a secure method for these agents to communicate with and access resources across different systems and networks. These updates aim to offer greater control, security, and flexibility for enterprises deploying AI agents on their own infrastructure.

items.summary: Claude Managed Agents 新增两项功能：自托管沙箱和MCP隧道。这两项功能现已可用。

items.title: Introducing the Claude Platform on AWS
items.content: Introducing the Claude Platform on AWS
items.contentSnippet: Introducing the Claude Platform on AWS

summaries.zh: Claude平台现已在AWS（亚马逊云服务）上推出。此公告确认了Claude模型可以通过AWS云服务访问。目前尚无更多关于该平台具体功能、定价或技术细节的公开信息。
summaries.en: The article announces the launch of Anthropic's Claude platform on Amazon Web Services (AWS). This integration makes Claude's advanced AI models, designed for safety and helpfulness, available as a managed service within the AWS cloud ecosystem. The partnership aims to provide developers and businesses with secure, scalable access to Claude for building AI-powered applications and solutions. The service is part of AWS's strategy to expand its AI offerings and leverage Anthropic's research capabilities.

items.title: Collaborate with Claude across Excel, PowerPoint, Word and Outlook
items.content: Collaborate with Claude across Excel, PowerPoint, Word and Outlook
items.contentSnippet: Collaborate with Claude across Excel, PowerPoint, Word and Outlook

summaries.zh: Claude 现在能够与微软 Office 套件中的四个主要应用程序进行协作，包括 Excel、PowerPoint、Word 和 Outlook。
summaries.en: This article announces Claude's availability across Microsoft Office applications. It highlights that Claude can now collaborate with users directly within Excel, PowerPoint, Word, and Outlook, integrating AI assistance into these common productivity tools. The update enables seamless interaction with Claude to perform tasks and work within the familiar interfaces of these Office programs.

items.summary: Claude 现在能够与微软 Office 套件中的四个主要应用程序进行协作，包括 Excel、PowerPoint、Word 和 Outlook。
